title: Thermal Enchantment
description: This mod/datapack adds an enchantment to prevent you from taking damage from magma blocks.
body:
This mod/datapack adds an enchantment called "Thermal" to the game.
This enchantment is gotten from Villagers and can be put on boots.
Having boots with this enchantment will prevent you from taking damage on magma blocks, the same effect you'd get from using frost walker except that this places no ice blocks on water.
